reasons: cross-surface Atlas, Map, and profile links

reproducibility.detail: Clean Linux and Windows default gates passed for immutable implementation commit 663122c, including Linux Worker HTTP smoke against Public Schema 1.1.0.

static_correctness.detail: Lint, typecheck, production build, release ownership checks, public release projection, API tests, and the default release gate pass locally.
evidence: Default Release Gate 20 passed, 0 failed, 1 expected Windows skip

public_contracts.detail: Institution and Place are independent stable public entities with explicit facility crosswalks, canonical routes, sources, revisions, precision, and release metadata.
evidence: PublicInstitutionSummary and PublicPlaceSummary are independent contracts
Public Release 2026.07.18.1 includes institutions and places in API and D1 projections
Worker accepts Public Schema 1.0.0 rollback releases and current 1.1.0 releases
No numbered releases repository duplicate remains

media_and_content_truth.detail: The entity pages are no-media-safe, preserve source-backed organization/place distinctions, and do not infer coordinates from locality or country precision.
evidence: All published Place records declare locality precision
No unlicensed entity media is introduced
Beta trust and public-data hard gates PASS

browser_journeys.detail: Canonical entity pages, redirects, old slugs, Atlas/Map/Profile integration, unsupported records, and no-JS behavior pass automated browser tests.
evidence: Canonical and locale redirect assertions PASS

automated_accessibility.detail: Chinese and English Institution and Place pages pass automated WCAG A/AA checks and 320-pixel mobile reflow assertions.
evidence: Chinese and English Institution entity Axe checks PASS
Chinese and English Place entity Axe checks PASS

visual_regression.detail: Named bilingual semantic visual review for the new Institution and Place surfaces is not recorded.

performance_budgets.detail: Institution and Place routes each load 108 kB of first-load JavaScript, below the Slice 8 route target of 170 kB.
evidence: Institution route First Load JS 108 kB
Place route First Load JS 108 kB

staging.detail: The OpenNext Staging build completed, but deployment could not proceed because the current execution environment has no Cloudflare deployment credential.
evidence: OpenNext web build completed for the Slice 8 web tree; the final 663122c fix changed Worker-only code
Wrangler deployment stopped before upload because the required credential is unavailable
No temporary Cloudflare account was used

human_signoff.detail: Product-owner, bilingual semantic/source/precision review, and named screen-reader review are not recorded.

release_decision.detail: Implementation and local automation pass, but production release remains blocked by incomplete Staging deployment, visual review, and human sign-off.
